entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "ସୁଯୋଗ ମୂଲ୍ୟ (Opportunity cost)"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "ଏକ କମ୍ପାନୀ ଏହି ବଜାରରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିବା ଉଚିତ୍ କି?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "କେଉଁ ଜିନିଷ ଏକ ଯୁକ୍ତିକୁ ବୈଧ କରିଥାଏ?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Socratic Instruction କୁ foundations ବିଷୟ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍ ଓ ଅଧିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ AI ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ସହିତ।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ଅଧିକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a ଛୋଟ ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ rather than a ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଆପଣଙ୍କ reasoning, ନୁହେଁ just the result.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: ଏକ ଅନୁମାନ ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ଦ୍ୱାରା ଲେଖନ the ଧାରଣା back ରୁ ସ୍ମୃତି.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: ଭିତ୍ତିଭୂମି

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: ଯେଉଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀମାନେ ଏକ ବିଷୟକୁ ଚିନ୍ତା କରିବାକୁ, ଅନୁମାନ ପରୀକ୍ଷା କରିବାକୁ ଏବଂ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ବୁଝାମଣା ଗଢ଼ିବାକୁ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ AI କୁ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏକ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: concept, argument, problem, text କିମ୍ବା decision କୁ focused chain of questions ରେ ପରିଣତ କରନ୍ତୁ। ଆପଣଙ୍କ buddy ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ answer ଶୁଣେ, assumptions ଓ gaps map କରେ, ଏବଂ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ନିଜ final synthesis ଦିଗକୁ ଠେଲେଇଦେଏ। ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ: "opportunity cost ବୁଝିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କର।"

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Socratic AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍ Deeper Understanding: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍ ପାଇଁ

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: ସୋକ୍ରେଟିକ୍ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶନା

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Socratic Instruction ରେ ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ। ପାଖାପାଖି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫର୍ମାଟ୍ ଚାହିଁଲେ Collaborative Instruction ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମର ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ସାଥୀ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ କ’ଣ କରିବା ଉଚିତ ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the ମୋଡ୍ କ’ଣ ଆପଣ ହେଉଛି trying କୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ କିମ୍ବା produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: ସେହି ତଫାତ୍ flow ଭିତରେ ଦେଖାଯାଏ। ଏକ giant response ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ, ସର୍ବୋତ୍ତମ sessions ଏକ loop ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଯାଏ: goal set କରନ୍ତୁ, କିଛି ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ, feedback ପାଆନ୍ତୁ, weak spot repair କରନ୍ତୁ, ଏବଂ next action ବାଛନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: ସେହି focus matters. A general chatbot ପାରେ ଉତ୍ତର almost anything, but a ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍ gives the conversation a shape. ଏହା nudges ଆପଣ toward the kind of thinking, ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ମତାମତ, କିମ୍ବା exploration ସେହି helps the ଧାରଣା stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: ଟ୍ୟୁଟର ଗୋଟିଏ ସମୟରେ ଗୋଟିଏ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତି, ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଯୁକ୍ତିକୁ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତି, ଏବଂ ଆପଣ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବା ପରେ ହିଁ ସିଦ୍ଧାନ୍ତ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରନ୍ତି।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: ଏହି ହେଉଛି the same ଅଭ୍ୟାସ behind studying ସହିତ AI ନକଲ୍ ଛଡ଼ା yourself: keep the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ active. AI ହେଉଛି most ଉପଯୋଗୀ କେବେ ଏହା gives ଆପଣ ମତାମତ ଉପରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ହେଉଛି especially ଉପଯୋଗୀ ପାଇଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କିଏ want କୁ:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: ପଦକ୍ଷେପଟିକୁ ନିଜ ଶବ୍ଦରେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: Turn confusion into a clearer model. ବିଷୟ

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: ଉତ୍ତର ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସଙ୍କେତ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: ତୁରନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସହିତ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଅନୁକୂଳ ହୋଇପାରୁଥିବା session ଚାହିଁଲେ Socratic Instruction ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ରଥମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ impressive ଶୁଣାଯିବା ନୁହେଁ; ପ୍ରଥମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପକୁ ସମ୍ଭବ ଲାଗିବା ଭାବେ କରିବା।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ କେଉଁଥିରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: ପରେ କେଉଁଠାକୁ ଯିବେ

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: ଆପଣ ପାରେ also ଆରମ୍ଭ ସହିତ a rough version of ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବାସ୍ତବ ସମସ୍ୟା. A messy ପ୍ରଥମ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ହେଉଛି fine. The ଅଧିବେଶନ ପାରେ clarify the level, ଦର୍ଶକ, deadline, ଓ style once ଆପଣ begin.
